mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_doc (doc_no, doc_type, title, source_type, source_id, content, status, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{docNo}, #{docType}, #{title}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{content}, #{status}, #{version}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_doc WHERE doc_type = #{docType} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT question, expected_doc_nos AS expectedDocNos FROM rag_eval_dataset WHERE enabled = 1
